title: Stock futures soar, oil prices fall as Trump says U.S. has reached peace deal with Iran
body: Oil prices fell and U.S. stock-index futures jumped Sunday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. has agreed to a peace deal with Iran, apparently ending months of hostilities that shut the Strait of Hormuz and sent the global economy into an oil shock.

title: SpaceX shows investors still want moonshots. The Fed may test that theory this week.
body: Higher interest rates could make the AI growth story that’s been powering the bull market harder to justify.

title: Will the real Kevin Warsh please stand up? Ahead of his first Fed meeting, economists honestly don’t know what to expect.
body: Perhaps the only thing that can be said with certainty about Kevin Warsh’s press conference following his first meeting as Federal Reserve chair this week is that he will have a captive audience.
